explicit_text: I was born and raised in Cleveland, Ohio, and spent my early childhood there before moving away. Cleveland is where my story begins, and it shaped my early years until I was about eleven. It’s the city where my family roots were planted before we relocated to Michigan.

explicit_text: My German heritage is a big part of my family’s history, especially through my great-great-grandfather Leopold Rothschild and the Adler family in Mannheim, Germany. The story goes back over 120 years to Mannheim, where my ancestors lived before fleeing due to the rise of the Nazi party. Germany is where the Rothschild and Adler families endured World War I and the horrors leading up to Kristallnacht.

explicit_text: Leopold Rothschild was my great-great-grandfather, one of eight Jewish brothers who all served and survived World War I.
